text: 10. PAYMENT: The  Contractor  agrees  to  pay  the  Subcontractor  for  the  full,  faithful,  timely  and  complete  performance  of  this Subcontract the Subcontract Amount stated on page 1 of the Subcontract, including all applicable taxes, and subject to additions and deductions for changes agreed upon in writing and all terms and conditions of payment. Payment of the stipulated sum is conditioned upon the submittal of Contractor's Application for Payment (Exhibit 'B') hereby made a part of this Subcontract by reference. No payment will be made for services provided that are not submitted according to these submittal requirements.
